name: Not Easy
short_description: Get ready for the ultimate challenge with Not Easy, a hardcore platformer that tests your skills and patience. Navigate relentless obstacles, gather keys, and unlock doors across 60 intense levels. Each level is designed to push your reflexes and determination to the limit. Can you conquer Not Easy?
detailed_description:
Prepare yourself for the ultimate challenge with Not Easy, a hardcore platformer designed to push you to your absolute limits. Navigate through relentless obstacles and gather keys to unlock doors, advancing to the next level. With around 60 intense levels, this game will test your skills, patience, and perseverance. Are you ready to prove your mastery?

Features:

  • 60 Intense Levels: Each level designed to challenge your platforming skills.
  • Relentless Obstacles: Face a variety of obstacles that will push you to your limits.
  • Key Collecting Mechanics: Gather keys to unlock doors and progress to the next level.
  • Hardcore Gameplay: Perfect for players who crave a demanding and rewarding experience.
